# GetMeFound

GetMeFound (GMF) is a done-for-you visibility service for local businesses.
Clients use GMF to keep their Google profile, reviews, business facts, and AI/search visibility current without learning another marketing tool.

## What we do

### Get Found
A one-time Google-facing setup for local businesses that need to look current, trustworthy, and easy for AI search to understand.
Includes business fact cleanup, profile/website consistency checks, review path setup, and a before/after visibility snapshot.

### Stay Found
Monthly visibility upkeep with review requests, profile freshness checks, public proof monitoring, and a plain-English report.
Keeps the business from going stale after the first setup.

### Always Ready
The deeper readiness layer for businesses that want recurring AI/search checks, answer-ready content opportunities, guarded review reply drafts, and voice/readiness preparation when approved.

## Client experience
Paid clients get a private magic-link client page where they can see setup status, needed actions, visibility reports, review activity, proof, and downloadable report copies.

## Who we serve
Local and small service businesses where reputation directly drives new customers.
Typically: businesses where customers check reviews before choosing, service providers who book appointments, businesses with repeat customers, and owner-operated businesses without a dedicated marketing team.

Examples include dental practices, salons, med spas, clinics, accountants, attorneys, local service businesses, and other owner-operated businesses that rely on Google visibility and reputation.

## Contact
